title: adonis autumnalis var. micrantha
intro: Adonis autumnalis var. micrantha, also known as the lesser autumn crocus or autumn snowflake, is a plant species in the ranunculaceae family, characterized by its small, white flowers and narrow, grass-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Adonis autumnalis var. micrantha include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
